channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Undisclosed funding influences health care legislation [PODCAST]
item.description: Subscribe to The Podcast by KevinMD. Watch on YouTube. Catch up on old episodes! Patients lose access to essential medications, and doctors face...

item.title: 11 Natural Ways to Reduce Your Cortisol Levels
Does Yogurt Consumption Reduce Colon Cancer Risk?
Common Walking Errors and How to Correct Them
item.description: Walking is an excellent low-impact exercise, but improper footwear, pace, or routine can hinder progress and increase injury risk.
